name: Step By Step Financial Wellness
description_short: Step By Step Financial Wellness offers credit improvement consultations, DIY credit guides, and ongoing financial coaching to help consumers dispute errors and improve credit scores.
description_long:
Step By Step Financial Wellness is a credit improvement service operating through an online appointment booking system (sbsservices.as.me). The company positions itself as a hands-on credit repair partner, emphasizing rapid results with the tagline "You Can't Afford to Have Bad Credit, Let Me Help You Reach Your Goals." The founder/operator promises improvements in as little as 30 days through personalized guidance.

The company offers three primary service tiers: (1) The Foundation to Financial Wellness consultation ($50 for 30 minutes, available as individual or couple sessions), which assesses client fit for an ongoing credit improvement program and explores financial situation and goals; (2) DIY Credit Clean Up Guide ($50, lifetime access), a self-guided digital product teaching credit score improvement, dispute of inaccurate items, and free credit monitoring resources, including dispute templates; and (3) Personal A-La-Carte Coaching ($60 per hour), offered via phone or Zoom for general financial questions. Additionally, they offer a free SBS Spending Plan + Payday Routine template for expense organization.

Step By Step Financial Wellness distinguishes itself through personalized, one-on-one consultation approaches rather than automated systems. The company provides both hands-on coaching for clients seeking guidance and a DIY option for self-directed consumers. The founder emphasizes direct phone support (248-372-9926) and transparent payment processes via email invoicing. The free spending plan template and lifetime access to dispute templates represent added value components.

The company operates as a smaller, service-based credit improvement firm without published credentials, certification, or regulatory disclosures visible on the booking page. Payment friction exists through required email invoicing and a $3 transaction fee on all bookings. No information is provided about dispute success rates, program completion outcomes, money-back guarantees, or how the Foundation program differs structurally from the initial consultation. The website lacks detail on what ongoing coaching entails, duration, or total cost.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers rapid credit improvement timeline (claims results in as little as 30 days)
Provides DIY option with lifetime access to guides and dispute templates for self-directed consumers
Includes free SBS Spending Plan + Payday Routine template for expense tracking
Direct phone support available (248-372-9926) for appointment issues
Couple consultation option available for joint credit improvement needs
Flexible coaching tiers: Foundation program, DIY guide, or à la carte 1-hour sessions
Transparent about payment method (email invoicing) and $3 transaction fee disclosure
cons: No published credentials, certifications, or regulatory compliance information visible on website
Payment friction through required email invoicing system with business-day delays for after-hours bookings
$3 nonrefundable transaction fee on all bookings does not apply to service
Lacks transparency on dispute success rates, program completion outcomes, and total cost of Foundation program
No information about refund/money-back guarantees or what distinguishes Foundation program from initial consultation
best_for: Consumers seeking personalized one-on-one credit coaching and monthly guidance over 30+ days
DIY-oriented individuals willing to handle their own disputes with templates and step-by-step guidance
Couples managing joint credit improvement goals together
Consumers needing general financial and budgeting coaching beyond credit repair alone
diagnosis: Step By Step Financial Wellness is best for consumers seeking personalized, hands-on credit improvement coaching or those preferring a self-guided dispute approach with templates. The primary caveat is the lack of published credentials, success metrics, or regulatory disclosures; potential clients should verify the operator's qualifications and request clear pricing/outcome details before committing to the Foundation program.
services: Foundation to Financial Wellness individual consultation (30 min, $50)
Foundation to Financial Wellness couple consultation (30 min, $50)
DIY Credit Clean Up Guide (digital product, $50, lifetime access with dispute templates)
Personal A-La-Carte 'Pick My Brain' Coaching Call (1 hour, $60, phone or Zoom)
Free SBS Spending Plan + Payday Routine template
Dispute of inaccurate or unverifiable credit report items
Free credit monitoring resources and recommendations
Monthly financial coaching (as part of Foundation program)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: Offers credit improvement consultations, DIY guides, and financial coaching to help consumers dispute errors and improve credit scores.
